title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony is emerging as a superstar at World Baseball Classic
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Roman Anthony hit a game-winning home run for Team USA against the Dominican Republic in the 2026 World Baseball Classic.
Anthony, 21, is batting .318 with two home runs and seven RBIs in the tournament, showcasing his potential.
Despite playing only 71 MLB games, Anthony is seen as a promising talent by veterans like David Ortiz and Bryce Harper.

title: 5 Boston sports moments that just missed out on the Soundbites Bracket
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Bill Lee's quotes were excluded from the Soundbites Bracket for lacking a standout signature moment.
Rob Gronkowski's 'Yo soy fiesta' quote was omitted for being below the bracket threshold of iconic soundbites.
Dick Williams' bold 1967 prediction missed inclusion despite representing a turning point in Red Sox history.

title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien returned as host for the Oscars 2026, bringing humor with topical and oddball jokes.
O'Brien's monologue included jokes about Netflix CEO Ted Sarandos and a mock company for mobile film watching.
Jimmy Kimmel joined as a guest, delivering politically charged humor while presenting documentary categories.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Janet Swallow, a 68-year-old nurse, was allegedly killed by 18-year-old Anthony DeMayo in her Danvers home.
A GoFundMe has raised nearly $50,000 for Swallow's family, with a goal of $65,000.
DeMayo is facing murder charges and reportedly told police he had planned the attack for a long time.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey defeated No. 4 Minnesota 4-2 to advance to the Frozen Four.
Sophomore goalie Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves, securing the Huskies' victory over Minnesota.
Northeastern will face No. 1 Ohio State in the 2026 Frozen Four at Pegula Ice Arena on March 20.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: JetBlue plane at Logan Airport delayed for hours due to bomb threat call to MassPort.
State Police confirmed the bomb threat on the Vero Beach-bound plane was not credible.
FBI, firefighters, and bomb sniffing dogs searched the plane; no arrests have been made.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen people were arrested during the St. Patrick's Day parade in South Boston, police reported.
MBTA Transit Police confiscated over 30 'borgs' and other alcoholic beverages at Broadway Station.
Residents reported issues like underage drinking and public indecency to Boston's 311 service during the parade.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'One Battle After Another' won Best Picture at the 2026 Oscars with a total of six awards.
Michael B. Jordan won Best Actor for 'Sinners,' which secured four Oscars, including Best Original Screenplay.
'KPop Demon Hunters' won Best Animated Feature, while 'Frankenstein' took Best Production Design and Best Costume Design.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: The 2026 Oscars red carpet was hosted at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, showcasing top fashion from Hollywood stars.
A-listers like Kate Hudson, Timothee Chalamet, and Elle Fanning were among those who walked the red carpet.
Conan O'Brien, hosting the Oscars for the second year, stayed discreet about his monologue for the evening.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas, 46, from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for visually impaired individuals.
Miraningtyas is motivated by her personal experience with pterygium, a condition affecting her vision requiring surgical treatment.
She aims to raise awareness and support for affordable eye care and vision-restoring treatments through her marathon run.
